description: Our species count is 810 vs oracle's 807. We include Necrozma-Dusk-Mane, Necrozma-Dawn-Wings, and Ultra Necrozma as separate entries for engine convenience (Ultra Burst gimmick). Oracle treats them as formes of Necrozma.
source: Battle-relevant forms stored as separate entries for direct lookup by the engine

description: Necrozma-Dusk-Mane exists in our data as a separate species entry. Oracle treats it as a forme of Necrozma (baseSpecies='Necrozma').
source: Ultra Burst gimmick requires separate species entries for form lookup

description: Necrozma-Dawn-Wings exists in our data as a separate species entry. Oracle treats it as a forme of Necrozma (baseSpecies='Necrozma').
source: Ultra Burst gimmick requires separate species entries for form lookup

description: Ultra Necrozma exists in our data as a separate species entry. Oracle treats it as a forme of Necrozma (baseSpecies='Necrozma').
